reference_transcript: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today? To pull up your account, could you give me the billing email please? Sure, it's under my name and the usual email I sign in with. I got charged twice this month and I only have one subscription. I hear you. Let me see what's posted on the account this cycle. So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund. So how long is it going to take to fix? I just want to make sure this doesn't happen again next month. This is the third time I've called. Put me through to a manager. That's fair. I'll escalate this to a manager so we can sort it properly. I've applied the refund and you'll see it in three to five days. Anything else? That's all, appreciate it.
